title: The CEO of Allbirds’ new AI biz has a plan, but no team

instagram.caption:
Fortune 500 buyers are already testing an AI prototype built by a CEO who has zero engineers and zero hires.

He ran a sneaker company. Now he’s trying to fix enterprise sales. The product is working before the team exists.

You might get a working demo before his first employee joins. That’s how fast this moves.

Watch for his first hire. That’s your signal to evaluate the tech. Is your plan still built on hiring — or on shipping? 👟📡⏱️
